station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, next to Landmark Building, Pai Nagar, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400092
text:
BIG SCAM! DON'T GET ROBBED HERE!

This petrol pump is a den of thieves! I went there today and they cheated me. They are taking money but NOT filling fuel. They are using "meter tricks" to steal our money. Either the fuel is mixed with chemicals or the machine is rigged.

They are selling air, not petrol. My vehicle stopped working 1km after filling from here. The staff is also involved in this theft.

Please, I beg you, do not go here. They are looting the common man in broad daylight

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, next to Landmark Building, Pai Nagar, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400092
text:
Okayish, the wait time is pretty high, they don't utilize the full capacity of the petrol pump due to which you need to wait for atleast 5 minutes and max. 10-15 minutes.

The staff is slow and they keep you waiting by roaming here and there.

The manager needs to sensitize the staff.
No free air for your tyres like other petrol pumps.

So this was an average experience.

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, next to Landmark Building, Pai Nagar, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400092
text:
Very congested area..

This petrol pum is exactly opposite off borivali fatak and next to Pagli showroom ... 3-4 min walkable distance from Borivali Railway Station..Diesel, Petrol, CNG available... But too much cozzy place.. Always crowded with people.. Mostly long queue of auto rickshaw ..Card are acceptable ..ATM Machine inside petrol pump but not well maintained....

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, next to Landmark Building, Pai Nagar, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400092
text:
Bharat petroleum corporation ltd petrol pump located at junction of SV Road &  landmark building corner in  Borivali west near railway station 🚉.
BPCL petrol pump is most busy and crowded .
It sells gasoline,lubricant petrol & disel.
Staff is courteous and helpful. Waiting time and delay occurred due to rise in sudden  footfall in afternoon/evening time.

Air tyre service available from early morning 🌄 to night.

Nitrogen N 2 air station not available.

Rates of petrol and oil displayed well .Fire safety 🔥 protocols strictly followed here.

station_address: Swami Vivekanand Rd, next to Landmark Building, Pai Nagar, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400092
text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
One of the Best Petrol Pumps in Town!
I recently visited this petrol pump and was genuinely impressed. One of the best things about it is that it's rarely crowded – I just drove in with my car, and within minutes, my tank was full. The process was smooth and quick. Another big plus is that the pump has two entry and exit points, which makes access super easy and hassle-free. Highly recommended for anyone looking for quick and convenient refueling!
